ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subsections" (
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsection */,
  "subsection_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsection */,
  "water_body_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water body the subsection belongs to */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the subsection */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the subsection */,
  "subsection_type" TEXT /* Type of subsection (e.g., lake, river, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subsection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subsection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsections_water_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_body_id") REFERENCES water_bodies ("water_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_bodies" (
  "water_body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water body */,
  "water_body_name" TEXT /* Name of the water body */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the water body */,
  "water_body_type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., lake, river, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the water body was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the water body was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_data" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring event */,
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsection being monitored */,
  "triggered_mean_count" REAL /* Triggered mean count value */,
  "triggered_10_year_prob" REAL /* Triggered 10-year probability value */,
  "triggered_primary_mean_count" REAL /* Triggered primary mean count value */,
  "monitoring_date" TEXT /* Date of monitoring */,
  "monitoring_method" TEXT /* Method used for monitoring (e.g., sensor, manual, etc.) */,
  "monitoring_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the monitoring event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the monitoring data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the monitoring data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_data_subsection_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsection_id") REFERENCES subsections ("subsection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flood_risk_probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability calculation */,
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsection being calculated */,
  "probability_value" REAL /* Flood risk probability value */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date of calculation */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used for calculating the flood risk probability */,
  "probability_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the probability calculation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the probability was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the probability was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flood_risk_probabilities_subsection_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsection_id") REFERENCES subsections ("subsection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsection being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, etc.) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_subsection_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsection_id") REFERENCES subsections ("subsection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version creation */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version changes */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_message" TEXT /* Message about the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_monitoring_id FOREIGN KEY ("monitoring_id") REFERENCES monitoring_data ("monitoring_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read-only, edit) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
